creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
devel/sqlite3 has been updated from 3.7.16.1 to 3.7.17
This didn't come with a shlib version bump, but subversion still needs to be rebuilt to be useful.

Fix: 

Bump port revision for devel/subversion to chase databases/sqlite3 update.
How-To-Repeat: * checkout ports revision 316355
* build devel/subversion
* checkout ports revision 319492
* build databases/sqlite3
* install devel/subversion
* install databases/sqlite3

$ svn co --depth=empty svn://svn.freebsd.org/base
svn: E200029: Couldn't perform atomic initialization
svn: E200030: SQLite compiled for 3.7.17, but running with 3.7.16.1
